constructor.details: Instantiates the instance testing suite with the configuration.

convertToBase(uint256).details: Converts base amount to the equivalent amount in ETH.

convertToShares(uint256).details: Converts base amount to the equivalent amount in LsETH.

deployCoordinator(address).details: Deploys the LsETH deployer coordinator contract.

params._factory: The address of the Hyperdrive factory contract.

deployFactory().details: Deploys the Hyperdrive Factory contract and sets      the default pool configuration.

deployHyperdrive(bytes32,bytes32,(addres.details: Deploys all Hyperdrive contracts using the      deployer coordinator contract.

params.asBase: Initialize the market with base token.
params.contribution: The amount to initialize the market.

getExtraData().details: Gets the extra data used to deploy Hyperdrive instances.

getSupply().details: Fetches the total supply of the base and share tokens.

getTokenBalances(address).details: Fetches the token balance information of an account.

setUp().details: Forge function that is invoked to setup the testing environment.

test__deployAndInitialize__asBase().details: Test to verify a market can be deployed and initialized funded by the      base token. Is expected to revert when base deposits are not supported.

test__deployAndInitialize__asShares().details: Test to verify a market can be deployed and initialized funded      by the share token.

test__kind().details: Tests that the kinds of the Hyperdrive instance and deployer      coordinator are correct.

test__name().details: Tests that the names of the Hyperdrive instance and deployer      coordinator are correct.

test__version().details: Tests that the versions of the Hyperdrive instance and deployer      coordinator are correct.

test_close_long_with_base(uint256,int256.details: Fuzz Test to ensure withdrawal accounting is correct when closing      longs with the base token. This test case is expected to fail if      base withdraws are not supported.

params.variableRate: Rate of interest accrual over the position duration.

test_close_long_with_shares(uint256,int2.details: Fuzz Test to ensure withdrawal accounting is correct when closing      longs with the share token. This test case is expected to fail if      share withdraws are not supported.

params.variableRate: Rate of interest accrual over the position duration.

test_close_short_with_base(uint256,int25.details: Fuzz Test to ensure withdrawal accounting is correct when closing shorts      with the base token. This test case is expected to fail if base withdraws      are not supported.

test_close_short_with_shares(uint256,int.details: Fuzz Test to ensure withdrawal accounting is correct when closing shorts      with the share token. This test case is expected to fail if share withdraws      are not supported.

test_open_long_with_base(uint256).details: Fuzz Test to ensure deposit accounting is correct when opening      longs with the base token. This test case is expected to fail if      base deposits are not supported.

params.basePaid: Amount in terms of base to open a long.

test_open_long_with_shares(uint256).details: Fuzz Test to ensure deposit accounting is correct when opening      longs with the share token. This test case is expected to fail if      share deposits are not supported.

params.basePaid: Amount in terms of base to open a long.

test_open_short_with_base(uint256).details: Fuzz Test to ensure deposit accounting is correct when opening shorts      with the base token. This test case is expected to fail if base deposits      are not supported.

test_open_short_with_shares(uint256).details: Fuzz Test to ensure deposit accounting is correct when opening      shorts with the share token. This test case is expected to fail if      base deposits are not supported.
